# Test fixtures

`ocrtest.ttf` is a glyph subset of **DejaVu Sans** (ASCII letters, digits,
space, `.` and `,`), used only by the OCR tests to render a known-text page.

DejaVu Sans is distributed under the permissive Bitstream Vera / Arev fonts
license, which allows redistribution and subsetting. See
<https://dejavu-fonts.github.io/License.html>.
